# External Research Index

Chronological index of research drops from the Slack AI scanner. See
`~/.claude/slack-scanner/` for the scanner source. Each drop is an analysis
of an external tool, pattern, or research artifact discovered in
`#ai-*` channels in the zerobias.org Slack workspace, scored for SME Mart
relevance.

## 2026-04-09

- [pattern-skills-vs-mcp](2026-04-09-pattern-skills-vs-mcp.md) — Two-layer agent architecture: knowledge in skills, execution in MCP. 100x context reduction pattern (relevant: Plan 033 P5, Plan 074)
